import React from "react";
import styled from "styled-components";

export const Work = () => {
    return (
        <StuledWork>
            <Image src="" alt=""/>
            <Title></Title>
            <Text></Text>
            <Link href={"#"}>demo</Link>
            <Link href={"#"}>code</Link>
        </StuledWork>
    )
}


const StuledWork = styled.div`
`

const Image = styled.img`
    
`

const Title = styled.h3`
    
`

const Text = styled.p`
    
`

const Link = styled.a`
    
`
